title: Server Goes Live Monday Night — 9pm
body:
We're flipping the switch Monday, May 4th at 9pm. Hop on, claim some land, and start poking around. The world border opens at 1,750 blocks from spawn and grows each week based on combined playtime — so the more you play, the more world we all get.

Heads up: the End is locked. You can find the End Portal, but it won't be usable yet. We're saving the dragon for the group.

title: Dragon Kill Planned for May 11th
body:
We're planning to take down the Ender Dragon together on Monday, May 11th at 9pm — one week after launch. If that night doesn't work for everyone, we'll vote on an alternative.

Reminder: the End is currently locked. The portal can be found but not entered until we open it for the dragon fight. Bring beds, blocks, and bows.

title: Server Launch!
body: mc.pvpers.us is officially live! Join us on our brand-new Vanilla+ server. We're running Paper 1.21 with a curated set of quality-of-life plugins. Come explore, build, and make this community your home.

title: Modpacks Available
body: Our recommended client-side modpacks are now available on CurseForge. Choose between the full QoL pack or the FPS Boost Potato Edition for lower-end machines.

title: World Border System Active
body: The playtime-gated world border is now active. As the community plays more, the world expands! Check the BlueMap to see current boundaries.
